title: The Torn Nets
hook: Thom slides a ragged scrap of chart across the counter: his supplier's nets keep coming up shredded in the shallows, and he'll pay to know why.
briefing: Testbed quest for trinkets: accepting it grants the map scrap, completing it grants Thom's letter. Droppable before a release.

trinkets.caption: Thom's chart of the shallows, torn at the corner

title: The Drowned Vault of Aldermere
hook: Thom leans close: beneath the old bay lies a sealed vault, and the thing that guards it has drowned braver crews than yours. Only a true company of legend should even attempt it.
briefing: A deadly high-level dungeon — gated so it never surfaces for a fresh party. If a low-level group is somehow offered this, the level gate has failed.

reward.note: and a name that outlives you
